fields.helpText: Pointer back to the ROI Instance file.
This is the first part of the status code:    'O' FOR OPEN;  'C' FOR CLOSED;  'P' FOR PENDING;  'N' FOR OTHER NONDISCLOSURE;   'X' FOR CANCELLED;  'E' FOR ERROR;  'A' FOR APPEALED;
Date the clerk entered for the status change.
Pointer to file 200 to access the clerk information.
This is the date that the status was set, it is no editable, it is set by  the software.

This field is for a status of "CLOSED". With the status field, this creates a full status code.   CLOSED STATUS (C) DISPOSITIONS  'D'  DENIED;  'G'  GRANTED;  'P'  PARTIAL;  'PR' PENDING PAYMENT RELEASED   PENDING STATUS (P) DISPOSITIONS  ''   NULL IS SIMPLY PENDING  'C'  CLARIFICATION  'P'  PENDINGPAYMENT (OBSOLETE)  'H'  PENDING PAYMENT HELD    OTHER NON DISCLOSURE STATUS (N) DISPOSITIONS  'NR' NO RECORDS;  'RF' REFERRAL;  'ND' NOT DESCRIBED;  'NV' NOT VA RECORD;  'RC' REQUEST CLOSED;  'RV' RE
If the status is pending due to an outstanding payment, this will be set  to 'P' for PAYMENT.
POINTER TO THE STATUS CODE FILE
